title: Prestige & Classic Motor Cars
description: An exceptional collection of pre-war British marques, post-war Continental grand tourers, and modern supercars. Featuring barn finds, concours-restored examples, and single-owner collections.

title: Youngtimer & Modern Classics
description: Sports cars, hot hatches, and limited-edition variants from the 1980s through 2000s. Highlights include low-mileage Japanese imports and European rally homologation specials.

title: Online Fleet Remarketing — Q3
description: Corporate fleet disposals including executive saloons, light commercial vehicles, and service fleet hatchbacks. All vehicles with full service history.

title: Italian Sports & Supercar Collection
description: A curated selection of Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati, and Alfa Romeo sports cars spanning five decades. Includes track-prepared examples and road-legal race cars.

title: American Muscle & Classics
description: Iconic American muscle cars, classic pickup trucks, and vintage convertibles. Features matching-numbers restorations and documented drag-strip veterans.

title: JDM & Import Specialists
description: Right-hand-drive Japanese domestic market vehicles including Skyline GT-Rs, Supras, NSXes, and kei cars. All export-ready with documentation.

title: Swiss Luxury & GT Collection
description: Premium grand tourers, luxury saloons, and limited-edition Swiss-delivered vehicles. Many single-owner examples with low mileage.

title: European EV & Hybrid Showcase
description: A forward-looking sale of electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles from major European and American manufacturers. Ideal for fleet buyers and early adopters.
